title: trifolium setiferum
intro: Trifolium setiferum, also known as the hairy clover, is a perennial legume plant native to Europe and western Asia. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever. The health benefits of Trifolium setiferum include its ability to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural diuretic, making it a popular remedy for urinary tract issues. Trifolium setiferum is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can be found in some herbal supplements and remedies.
